## Checklist

- [ ] Tested with Node v22 — `make build` completes without errors
- [ ] Svelte 5 runes syntax used throughout (`$state`, `$derived`, `$effect`, `$props`)
- [ ] Import groups sorted alphabetically; object keys unquoted where possible
- [ ] On-touch cleanup applied to all edited files (unsorted imports, orphan imports, duplicate headers)
- [ ] No new files created without a clear reason
- [ ] If this is a visual change: screenshot of the card in both preview and export included below
